chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 79 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.333/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.02.2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has challenged candidature of respondent No.1 to contest election as a Member Provincial Assembly on PS-34, Naushahro Feroze-III, on the ground that his nomination papers for PS-35, Naushahro Feroze-IV, were rejected by the Returning Officer. Therefore, acceptance of nomination papers of respondent No.1 on PS-34, Naushahro Feroze-III is not sustainable under the law. During arguments, it has transpired that petitioner neither filed any objection against the nomination papers of respondent No.1 on the above ground before the Returning Officer in terms of Section 62 of the Elections Act, 2017 (‘the Act’), nor he challenged his candidature before the Election Tribunal in terms of Section 63 of the Act, and has directly filed this petition. We find this petition not maintainable and therefore, dismiss this petition in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
